## Meeting Purpose

[Interview with Andrés Engler for Services Hiring Manager (Technical Managing Editor) role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves project management, client communication, and technical feedback on AI content generation platform](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Andrés has extensive experience in journalism, editing, and AI-driven content strategy, particularly with Coindesk](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX is hiring multiple managing editors to handle 3-5 clients each, delivering 8-10 content pieces per client weekly](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Position requires balancing editorial work, client management, and technical understanding of AI prompting](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Project management focus: client-side deliverables and AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Editorial responsibilities: ensuring timely publication and delivery](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Technical aspect: working with proprietary AI platform, providing feedback for improvements](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Team structure: work in a pod with content manager and director](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Client management: weekly calls, Slack communication, potential C-level interactions](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)

### Candidate Background

  - [Started as a journalist in Argentina at 19, worked for leading financial newspaper](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Transitioned to U.S.-based companies as reporter, then editor](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Currently working on product strategy and AI integration at Coindesk](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Manages international expansion, content review, and AI implementation](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Operates own studio providing services to startups, investment funds, and non-profits](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

### AI Experience

  - [Advised Coindesk to switch from DeepL to OpenAI for translations](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Worked on integrating ChatGPT with Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Involved in refining UI for different languages and reviewing multi-language content](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Experience with AI prompting, including JSON formatting and troubleshooting](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### Work Style and Skills

  - [Prioritizes deep work in mornings (4-5 hours), meetings in afternoons](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Uses Notion as a "second brain" for organization](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Comfortable working with engineering teams and filing detailed bug reports](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Demonstrates ability to drive significant improvements (e.g., 3x traffic increase at Coindesk)](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Eager to learn and adapt, especially in AI prompting and asking the right questions](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)

### GrowthX Specifics

  - [12 current managing editors, hiring multiple for this role](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Managing editors expected to handle 3-5 clients, 30-50 content pieces weekly](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Work hours align with ET afternoon (4-5 hours) to collaborate with San Francisco team](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [High-level stakeholder communication, including potential C-suite interactions](https://fathom.video/share/7fa4wjGwpXfSQJ4YLj_NyRwbgYVFNZ5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)

## Next Steps

  - Evaluate Andrés' fit for the role based on his experience and skills
  - Consider his adaptability and eagerness to learn, particularly in AI prompting
  - Assess his ability to manage multiple clients and high-volume content editing
  - Determine if his background in journalism and transition to AI-driven content aligns with GrowthX's needs
